# 34 North — Full Site Content

> Expert software development services: strategic consulting, database design, website and API development, and AI integration. Turning complex technical challenges into business results.

URL: https://34north.net
Contact: contact@34north.net

---

## About

34 North is a solo software development and consulting practice. Clients work directly with the developer — no account managers, no sales teams, no runaround. Services span the full stack from data layer to user interface.

---

## Software Consulting

Strategy first. Technology second.

Good software starts with clear thinking. 34 North works alongside clients to understand the business, map the real problem, and recommend the right technical path.

Services include:
- Technology audits and architecture reviews
- Build vs. buy analysis and vendor evaluation
- Technical roadmap and project planning
- Legacy system modernization and migration

---

## Database Design

Your data, perfectly structured.

A well-designed database is the foundation everything else depends on. 34 North designs schemas, query patterns, and data pipelines that stay fast and maintainable as data grows.

Services include:
- Relational and NoSQL schema design
- Query optimization and indexing strategies
- Data modeling for reporting and analytics
- Migrations, replication, and backup planning

---

## Website and API Development

Built to perform. Designed to last.

From new builds and site refreshes to complex web applications and backend APIs — fast, reliable, and built to last. SEO and performance are part of every project.

Services include:
- Custom websites and site refreshes built for speed
- REST and GraphQL API design and development
- SEO foundation and performance optimization
- Third-party integrations, auth, and security

Website projects start at $3,000, scaled to features and complexity.

---

## AI Integration and Management

AI that actually works for your business.

34 North cuts through the hype to find where AI creates real value — designing, integrating, and managing AI capabilities so teams benefit without being buried by complexity.

Approach:
- Integrate: Embed LLMs, vision models, and AI APIs directly into existing products and workflows.
- Optimize: Fine-tune prompts, manage costs, and ensure AI outputs are reliable, consistent, and safe.
- Monitor: Ongoing management of AI systems — tracking performance, costs, and quality over time.

---

## Why 34 North

- Full-Stack Depth: Database to UI, API to deployment — one person who sees the whole picture means fewer gaps and better design decisions.
- Fast Turnaround: No bureaucracy, no long sprint cycles. Decisions get made and work gets done at startup speed.
- Clear Communication: Regular updates in plain language. Always know where things stand — no jargon, no surprises.
- Built to Scale: Code and architecture designed with future growth in mind, without over-engineering for problems that don't exist yet.
- AI-Native Approach: AI tooling is incorporated throughout development where it adds value — faster delivery, smarter solutions, lower cost.
- Long-Term Partnership: Not just a vendor — a technical partner invested in client success. Many clients continue working together for years.

---

## Selected Work

- Rev Rup (https://revrup.com): A Christian resource platform featuring sermons, prayers, FAQs, and teaching materials on biblical topics — built for personal spiritual growth and church communities.
- GitHub (https://github.com/CodeNameSH): Open-source projects, experiments, and personal repositories.

Most production work was built within companies and is not publicly shareable. Contact for details.

---

## Retainer Plans

Monthly maintenance and support plans:

### Essential — $200/month
- Up to 3 hours per month
- Software and security updates
- Hosting and uptime monitoring
- Bug fixes and minor adjustments
- Priority email support
- Monthly status update

### Growth — $450/month (Most Popular)
- Up to 7 hours per month
- Everything in Essential
- Content and copy updates
- SEO monitoring and reporting
- 48-hour response guarantee
- Quarterly review call

### Partner — $800/month
- Up to 12 hours per month
- Everything in Growth
- Feature development priority
- Same-day response guarantee
- Monthly strategy call
- Dedicated roadmap planning

Non-profit and ministry organizations are welcome — reach out for custom pricing.

---

## Contact

Contact form: https://34north.net/#contact
Email: contact@34north.net
Response time: within two business days

All inquiries are handled personally. No sales teams, no runaround.

---

## FAQ

Q: What software development services does 34 North offer?
A: 34 North offers software consulting, database design, website development, API development, and AI integration and management services.

Q: How can I hire a software developer for my project?
A: Reach out through the contact form at https://34north.net/#contact. Describe your project and a response will come within two business days.

Q: Does 34 North work with AI and machine learning?
A: Yes. 34 North integrates and manages AI capabilities into existing products and workflows, and helps businesses adopt AI tooling effectively.

Q: How much does a website cost?
A: Website projects at 34 North start at $3,000, with pricing based on features and complexity. Monthly maintenance retainers start at $200/month.

Q: Does 34 North offer ongoing website maintenance?
A: Yes. Monthly retainer plans start at $200/month, covering maintenance, security updates, and ongoing support. Higher tiers include additional hours, SEO monitoring, and quarterly strategy calls.
